assumption: Simulated selected owned retail portfolio across Fashion Boutiques, Fragrance & Beauty retail, and Watches & Fine Jewelry.
Average monthly target across selected boutiques is anchored around $6.4M, with higher targets for flagship locations and lower targets for beauty-focused doors.

Categories use completed names: Handbags, Small Leather Goods, Costume Jewelry, Other Accessories, Eyewear, Fragrance & Beauty, Ready-to-Wear, Footwear, Watches, Fine Jewelry, Total Accessories, and Total Watches & Fine Jewelry.
Targets are generated by boutique, month, and category with seasonality and category-mix assumptions.
LY figures are simulated from current sales and category-level growth assumptions.
Advisor payout eligibility is based on sales attainment, clienteling score, and return/data-quality exception checks.
This dataset is simulated for analytics portfolio demonstration and does not represent Chanel internal data.
